classifications.phrase: Inflation has fallen substantially since the peak in 2022
underlying inflation to continue to moderate to around the midpoint
they were, at the margin, slightly stronger than expected
wait for a little more information to confirm that inflation remains on track
availability of labour is still a constraint for a range of employers
growth in unit labour costs remains high
domestic demand has been picking up over the past six months
risks to inflation have become more balanced

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a cautious holding pattern, acknowledging inflation progress and balanced risks while remaining vigilant about labour market tightness and slightly-stronger-than-expected inflation data.
